_comment: Zenodo deposit metadata for the TRT position paper. NOT deposit-ready until: refs verified (issue #1), public copy cut (status note stripped), version bumped to 1.0. See 0-program-methods/ops/zenodo-publishing.md.

metadata.title: Triadic Reality Theory: Finite Logic, Infinite Information, and Actualizing Action as the Foundation of Physical Reality
metadata.description: Triadic Reality Theory proposes that actualized physical reality is constituted by three co-requiring primitives: finite logical constraint, infinite informational potential, and actualizing action, denoted L3, I-infinity, and A, with actual reality given by the identity chi = A(I-infinity | L3). It is offered as a candidate foundational ontology and research programme, not a completed physical theory: two physics-facing conjectures (co-admissibility in decoherence; gravity as global co-admissibility) are stated with explicit failure conditions, and the effectiveness of mathematics is recovered as a retrodiction. The work is structured as a Lakatosian research programme with a transcendentally-warranted hard core, under Popperian demarcation.
metadata.notes: Prepared as an AI-enabled research programme; the repository carries full claim-to-proof traceability and a stated Popper/Lakatos methodology. Working-draft version 0.9 is NOT for deposit; first deposit is at v1.0 after reference verification and removal of the working-draft status note.
